responsibilities: Design and deploy automated trading algorithms that execute orders across multiple exchanges with minimal market impact
Optimize execution algorithms to reduce slippage and latency while adhering to predefined risk and exposure limits
Analyze order book dynamics and market microstructure to identify short-term price inefficiencies for algorithmic exploitation
Monitor live algorithmic strategies in real time, intervening to halt or adjust trading in response to anomalous market conditions
Backtest and simulate new algorithmic strategies against tick-level historical data to validate expected performance and risk
Collaborate with infrastructure engineers to minimize network latency and improve co-location and exchange connectivity
Conduct post-trade transaction cost analysis to measure execution quality against industry benchmark metrics
Continuously refine signal decay and alpha capture models to maintain strategy profitability amid changing market regimes
